misc.title: 🌩️FFシリーズ定番の召喚獣『ラムウ』が最新のHD-2Dで登場！ 幻獣と呼ばれるドットで表現された大きな召喚獣たちが繰り出す、迫力いっぱいの技演出も本作の見どころ！ 敵全体を巻き込み一気に大ダメージを与える「裁きの雷」の威力は必見です⚡️ 今後も心強い幻獣たちの情報を続々ご紹介していきますのでお楽しみに♪ #FFRS Video

misc.title: According to Fuji TV's official website, One Piece Episode 1169 will air on July 12, confirming that all 26 One Piece anime episodes scheduled for this year will air consecutively. After that, the ani
misc.text: According to Fuji TV's official website, One Piece Episode 1169 will air on July 12, confirming that all 26 One Piece anime episodes scheduled for this year will air consecutively. After that, the anime is expected to adapt the God Valley, Harald, and Loki flashbacks next year.

misc.title: 🔴⚫️🇵🇹 Gonçalo Ramos will be record signing for AC Milan, way in excess of €50m as @JamesHorncastle reported. Understand the fee can go well over €60/70m for Paris Saint-Germain with add-ons include
misc.text: 🔴⚫️🇵🇹 Gonçalo Ramos will be record signing for AC Milan, way in excess of €50m as @JamesHorncastle reported. Understand the fee can go well over €60/70m for Paris Saint-Germain with add-ons included. Medical already sorted and deal 100% done.

misc.text: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an average temperature of 29.8°C Around 40 people are confirmed to have drowned while swimming in efforts to cool down. (theguardian.com/world/2026/j…) Community note: The 29.8°C is France's national average of day and night temperatures across 30 weather stations; local highs reached 44.3°C. The 40 drownings occurred over the past week during the heatwave. apnews.com/article/heat-w… bbc.com/news/articles/… — https://nitter.net/PopBase/status/2069754874074398969#m
